zh.lifeSummary: 當Didier de Thiesselin於大約1420年出生在法國洛萊沃斯格斯多姆雷米-拉-普爾時，他的父親Jehan Thiesselin41歲，母親Mrs Jeannette de Thiesselin28歲。他和Jeanne至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1483年享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Didier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Late Latin Desiderius, derivative of desiderium ‘longing’; the name of an early bishop of Langres and 7th-century bishops of Auxerre, Cahors, and Vienne, all of whom are subjects of local cults.

en.lifeSummary: When Didier de Thiesselin was born about 1420, in Domrémy-la-Pucelle, Vosges, Lorraine, France, his father, Jehan Thiesselin, was 41 and his mother, Mrs Jeannette de Thiesselin, was 28. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Jeanne. He died about 1483, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Didier de Thiesselin est né environ 1420, à Domrémy-la-Pucelle, Vosges, Lorraine, France, son père, Jehan Thiesselin, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mrs Jeannette de Thiesselin, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Jeanne. Il est décédé environ 1483, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Didier de Thiesselin um 1420 in Domrémy-la-Pucelle, Vosges, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jehan Thiesselin 41 und seine Mutter Mrs Jeannette de Thiesselin 28. Er hatte mit Jeanne mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1483 im Alter von 65 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Didier de Thiesselin è nato il circa 1420 nel Domrémy-la-Pucelle, Vosges, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Jehan Thiesselin, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Jeannette de Thiesselin, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Jeanne. Morì circa 1483, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Didier de Thiesselinが約1420年にフランスロレィヌボスジェズドムルeムイ-ラ-プウセルで生まれた時，父Jehan Thiesselinは41歳，母Mrs Jeannette de Thiesselinは28歳であった。彼はJeanneとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1483年に65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Didier de Thiesselin(이)가 대략 1420년 프랑스 로레이인 보스그스 돔e미-라-푸셀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jehan Thiesselin(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Jeannette de Thiesselin(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Jeanne(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1483년 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Didier de Thiesselin родился около 1420 г. в местности домрeми-ла-пуселл, фосгесь, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Jehan Thiesselin было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs Jeannette de Thiesselin, 28.
